title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama CLI and server for running large language models locally with a simple API.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama, providing synchronous and asynchronous APIs.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama, usable in Node.js or browsers.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration for Ollama, exposing chat, embeddings, and tool-calling wrappers.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (now renamed Open WebUI) supporting chat, RAG, and admin controls.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with builder-style APIs and Spring Boot starters.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal Python template showing how to build a RAG pipeline over Ollama embeddings and Llama-3.

title: ollama-cli-chat
summary: Terminal UI chat client for Ollama written in Go with conversation history and markdown rendering.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experimental GitHub Copilot proxy that routes code-completion requests to a local Ollama model.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by Ollama providing Generator and Embedder nodes for pipelines.

title: ollama-npm
summary: Official npm package distributing the ollama-js client with TypeScript support.

title: ollama PyPI
summary: Official Python package on PyPI exposing the ollama-python client library.

title: ollama-cameroon
summary: Community-curated awesome list of tools, tutorials, and integrations around Ollama.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Discord bot that streams Ollama responses into channels via slash commands.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node selection.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Unofficial Rust crate providing async bindings to the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that lets users query local Ollama models from within notes.

title: ollama-django
summary: Reusable Django app adding Ollama chat completions via async views and Django REST serializers.

title: ollama-rag-langchain-streamlit
summary: One-click template combining Ollama, LangChain, Chroma, and Streamlit for PDF Q&A.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack Bot integration for Ollama using Bolt framework and socket mode for secure corporate use.
